Peter,
Today is two weeks after my announcement to serve America again, as President.
I've lived these weeks in Iowa in order to: shake over 15,000 hands from parades to firework displays; have daily media interviews on Iowan radio, TV and print (also national); and speak at climate change and disability forums, churches and veteran gatherings, and at numerous democratic assemblies — as over 30,000 brochures have been handed to individual voters.

I began today with my 5:30 a.m. run, and I ask you to help it end well with your support needed to go to phase II of our strategy: to now multiply my presence through social media, grow my field and community organization, with an expanding base of volunteers (e.g., already 150 coordinated in California!) — and we can only do it with your generous financial support.

Elizabeth is spending her time face-to-face with people at organizing events across the country.

And a lot of her ideas -- both big and small -- come from people raising their hands or slipping her notes at these events, from Iowa to Puerto Rico to West Virginia.

Like our plan to ensure a former public school teacher is the next secretary of education. That came from a supporter at a grassroots event. Or our student debt calculator tool. That came from a supporter who suggested we create a way for people to see exactly how much of their debt would be canceled.

**We know there aren 't always events close to you, or sometimes the timing doesn't work out, but we still want to hear from you.

The 2020 election is ramping up FAST, and we have to be prepared for anything.

National Republicans have their hearts set on defeating Ed. They want to replace Ed's progressive voice with a Trump look-a-like who will stand beside Mitch McConnell and demolish any Democratic proposal that reaches the Senate.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Asking for your thoughts, friend
body:
| | |
---
| Team, The next DNC debate is coming up in a few weeks and before I take the stage again, I want to hear directly from you. [**Will you let me know what you think should be discussed in the second debate?**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc098e/5fca0d19/860bd70/291bd334/3824631697/VEsH/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-survey?source=em_20190707") It's so important for an underdog campaign like ours to take advantage of whatever time we can get in the national spotlight, and part of that is making sure I'm speaking to the issues that matter to you. Team, I know that when I'm up on that stage, I'm representing you. [**So take a minute and let me know: What matters to you in this election and what issues should I bring to the national stage at the next debate?**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc098e/5fca0d19/860bd70/291bd334/3824631697/VEsE/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-survey?source=em_20190707") Thanks, Cory

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74264/images/tt2020%20email%20header.png]
Friend,

Together we’re building a campaign to win a Democratic majority and put the people back in power by sending Teresa to the United States Senate.

Tell us what’s motivating you to keep working for change: Take our quick priorities survey today! [https://teresatomlinson.com/tell-us-whats-motivating-you-to-keep-fighting-for-change/]

We need a fighter for working families to rebuild America’s middle class - and that starts with winning a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. Teresa is running because like you, she knows it’s time for a Senate that responds to OUR needs, not just those of corporate PACs and special interests super donors. If we’re going to protect and expand the right to vote, ensure criminal justice reform, and build an economy where everyone can thrive – not just those with political connections – we’re going to need to send a proven progressive like Teresa Tomlinson to get the job done.

David Perdue and his Republican allies are waging war on the environment, abortion rights, LGBTQ+ rights, healthcare, the middle class, and our tax system. This race could not be more important – we can only protect our values and keep America moving forward if we turn the Senate BLUE in 2020, and that means we must win Georgia .

Our priorities survey only takes 2 minutes to complete and is a direct line of communication we want to build for you to share your top issues with Teresa.

Click here to tell us which issues you’re most passionate about:

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://teresatomlinson.com/tell-us-whats-motivating-you-to-keep-fighting-for-change/]

Thanks!

Team Tomlinson

name: Voter Protection Project
subject: This Florida Republican just blocked half a million people from voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Last November, Florida voters approved Amendment 4 -- a ballot initiative to restore voting rights to ex-felons who have successfully completed probation and parole. It was on its way to restoring voting rights to up to 1.4 million people -- but Republican Governor Ron DeSantis just killed it to make sure Florida stays red.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Last November, Florida voters approved Amendment 4 -- a ballot initiative to restore voting rights to ex-felons who have successfully completed probation and parole. It was on its way to restoring voting rights to up to 1.4 million people -- **but Republican Governor Ron DeSantis just killed it to make sure Florida stays red.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0727/72412298/43c0e44c/610263a4/206922592/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Just a few short weeks ago, many folks underestimated us and wrote us off. But I just learned I am inches away from meeting the 130,000-donor threshold to qualify for the next Democratic debates. I am 95% of the way there as of 3pm! [_**Will you please rush in $15 and be the donor to put me over the top? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce59/3eb3e2fc/47ab9238/744ab0a9/1369357590/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190707_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") I want to take a step back for a moment and thank you for believing in me. subject: This is a different kind of campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Wilmot Collins is running a different kind of campaign than his opponent, Steve Daines.
While Steve prefers fancy fundraisers with Washington politicians and out-of-state millionaires, Wilmot is running a uniquely Montana campaign by listening to Montanans' needs and he's powered by a grassroots movement. Together we will take back Montana's Senate seat and send a fighter for our families to Washington, D.C.
**[Wilmot is relying on supporters like you to ensure he has the resources to compete and win this race. Can you chip in $5 right now to help send Wilmot to the U.S. Senate?](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190707&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We need to take Wilmot's message to every corner of this state--and that's an expensive feat. We need our grassroots supporters to help us get the resources we need to travel across Montana to meet with voters and to reach even more people over the airwaves and online.
In the Senate, Wilmot will fight for our families and our values. He will stand with our unions and our teachers. He will address climate change and fight to deliver health care for every American. But he can only do that if we help him get there--which is why your support for his campaign is so crucial.
[**Help us flip Montana 's Senate seat. Contribute $5 to help fund Wilmot's campaign.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. Trent Bolger

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I want to hear from you
body:
I have been back on the trail the last few days, first to Iowa, then South
Carolina this weekend, to speak directly with more voters, listen, and
learn. We have real momentum right now, and we need to use it to continue
to reach out to voters across the country.

I’m hearing directly from folks about the issues that directly impact
them.

I also want to make sure I hear from you as we move into the next phase of
this race. From day one, I made a promise to run a campaign of the people
and for the people. Your support powers everything we do.

Please forward it to any friends and family who are interested in our
campaign as well.

I appreciate everything you are doing right now for our campaign and for
